name: Champagne Cocktail
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Frozen Orange Juice Concentrate, thawed and undiluted
6 oz Frozen Limeade Concentrate, thawed and undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the orange juice and limeade concentrates in a large punch bowl.
2. Stir until well blended.
3. Add the champagne and sparkling water, stirring well.
4. Serve the punch over crushed ice.
